author: Five
name: FluxSuggestions
short: A lightweight reaction-based suggestion board for Fluxer.
description: Allows community members to submit anonymous suggestions which are posted to a configured pending channel with native thumbs-up and thumbs-down reactions. Red staff can approve or reject suggestions into configured result channels.
install_msg: Thank you for installing Flux Suggestions! Configure it with `[p]suggestions set pending #channel`, `[p]suggestions set approved #channel`, and `[p]suggestions set rejected #channel`.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores guild channel settings and aggregate suggestion statistics. While a suggestion is pending, it also stores the author's user ID, suggestion text, source channel ID, message ID, and submission time. Pending records are removed after approval, rejection, or a Red data-deletion request. Approved and rejected messages posted in community channels remain until community staff delete them.
